nasb.text: So the Lord cuts off head and tail from Israel, Both palm branch and bulrush in a single day.

esv.text: So the Lord cut off from Israel head and tail, palm branch and reed in one day—

cnv.text: 因此，耶和華在一日之間，必從以色列中剪除頭和尾、棕枝與蘆葦。

ccb.text: 因此，耶和华要在一日之间铲除以色列的头和尾。

csbs.text: 所以耶和华必在一天之内， 从以色列剪除头和尾，剪除棕枝和芦苇——
